channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: We used Google’s AI to analyze 188 predictions of what’s in store for tech in 2025
item.description: At this time of year investment banks, advertising agencies, and seemingly every other business on the planet share their predictions on what is likely to unfold in the next 12 months. Journalists’ inboxes sag under the weight of unsolicited predictions for the year ahead.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Say hello to SetMe: A modern solution for offering remote tech support
item.description: SetMe is a remote support solution for businesses of all sizes that allows IT teams to easily secure a connection to remote computers, allowing for ad-hoc or unattended support that was designed with years of experience in remote support software from the team behind FixMe.IT.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Amazon and Starbucks workers are on strike. Trump might have something to do with it
item.description: Amazon delivery drivers and Starbucks baristas are on strike in a handful of U.S. cities as they seek to exert pressure on the two major companies to recognize them as unionized employees or to meet demands for an inaugural labor contract.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas. At midnight on Saturday, workers at a prominent unionized warehouse in New York will also join, the Teamsters said.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: More CISA staff would keep working under DHS’ revised shutdown plan
item.description: Under a new plan, about one-third of CISA's staff will keep working through a shutdown. But experts are still concerned about the impact on U.S. cyber defenses. The post More CISA staff would keep working under DHS’ revised shutdown plan first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Inside IBM’s race to achieve quantum advantage
item.description: It’s an unscientific fact that nine out of every 10 conversations about tech in the past year have been about AI. But the 10th has been about quantum computing.
item.dc:creator: Adam Bluestein, Fast Company

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cost-conscious repatriation strategies
item.description: In recent years, the cloud computing landscape has undergone a seismic shift. After fully embracing the potential of public cloud services, many companies are reevaluating their strategies and shifting workloads back to on-premises infrastructures.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 wizardly ways to integrate web apps with Windows
item.description: While Windows is a powerful operating system for productivity, so much of what we do with work these days revolves around the web.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 12 Android tips you shouldn’t miss from 2024
item.description: Ah, the holidays. No matter what manner of winter celebration you prefer (I’m a Festivus man myself), late December is a fine time for kickin’ back and collecting your thoughts for the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nima Momeni found guilty in Cash App CEO's death
item.description: Nima Momeni testified he was defending himself when Cash App CEO Bob Lee was stabbed and later died at a local hospital
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Gemini Code Assist tools target developer productivity from within IDEs
item.description: Google has launched new Gemini Code Assist tools that are designed to help developers improve their productivity from within an integrated development environment (IDE), such as Visual Studio Code or JetBrains.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Steps to protect yourself while shopping on your phone this holiday season
item.description: The holiday season sees a rise in mobile shopping scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you learn how to stay safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Using VPNs without messing up your banking apps
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says a VPN enhances online banking security by encrypting data and protecting privacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
